# drift-analyzer
> Deterministic architectural drift detection and architectural linter for AI-assisted Python teams.

Package: drift-analyzer
Install: pip install drift-analyzer
Repository: https://github.com/sauremilk/drift
Documentation: https://sauremilk.github.io/drift/
Command: drift analyze --repo .

Keywords: architecture drift, architectural erosion, architecture degradation, architectural linter, technical debt detection, GitHub Copilot, AI coding tools, static analysis, Python

Summary: Drift is a deterministic static analyzer for Python repositories. It finds cross-file coherence problems such as pattern fragmentation, architecture violations, mutant duplicates, explainability deficits, temporal volatility, and system misalignment.
